parameters.name: idUrlPart
parameters.description:
Some IDs contain / and this is not permitted as a URI character. eg: app|test_translation|test/de.
Therefore, the ID can be split into two parts and the part after / can be sent as query parameter idUrlPart.
This only works for i18n IDs.

post.summary:

Additional commands (e.g. archiving, printing) will be queued up and executed in the background.

parameters.description: Only list print tasks that have been created from this template. (optional)

get.summary: Returns details about the requested print task, including its status and information about all generated documents.

delete.summary: Deletes the PrintTask and all temporary documents. Archived or printed documents are not deleted.

get.summary: Returns the editable RTF content of the specified document in the print task.

put.summary: Saves the edited document in the print task.

delete.summary: Deletes the specified attachment from the print container. It will not be included in the result file or the archive documents.

get.summary: Returns the generated PDF document from the print task.
Returns the requested archive document (PDF) from the print task.
Returns the result document (PDF) from the print task, which is the final document that will be printed.

post.summary: Uploads all local files for this print task to the archive storage as a backup.
Downloads all documents for the print task from the archive storage and stores them locally for further processing.
Queues up the specified actions for a print task.
Queues up RTF filling for the print task.
Queues up PDF conversion for the print task.
Queues up archiving for the print task. Requires PDF conversion to be completed first.
Queues up printing for the print task. Requires PDF conversion to be completed first.
Cancels all queued commands for the print task.

get.summary: Returns the progress of the queued up actions for the print task.
WebSocket endpoint to receive real-time updates about the progress of the print task.
Returns the current processing queue for print tasks.

post.summary:
Load queued up print tasks from the database and start processing them.
This is required after a server restart to resume processing.
